title: auerodendron cubense var. cubense
intro: Auerodendron cubense var. cubense, also known as the Panama disease fungus, is a plant pathogen that affects the Cavendish banana plant and is native to Southeast Asia. However, when referring to a plant, it is more commonly known as Auerodendron cubense. Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on the medicinal properties, health benefits, or herbal preparations of the Auerodendron cubense plant.
